name: FIRPTA Residential Use Exemption

eligibility.description: The property must be acquired for use as a residence and the total amount realized (sale price) must not exceed $300,000.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Exempts the transferee from the 15% FIRPTA withholding requirement when purchasing a property from a foreign person for use as a residence.
